summary: Flowtym AI Support Center - Real-time Notification System fully tested. All features working correctly: notification badge on floating button, notification center with bell icon, AI response notifications, status change notifications, mark as read functionality, mark all as read, and 30s polling.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: GET /api/support/hotels/{hotel_id}/notifications - Returns notifications list with correct structure
POST /api/support/hotels/{hotel_id}/notifications/{id}/read - Marks single notification as read
POST /api/support/hotels/{hotel_id}/tickets/{ticket_id}/ai-analyze - Creates AI response notification (type: ai_response)
PUT /api/support/hotels/{hotel_id}/tickets/{ticket_id} with status change - Creates status change notification (type: status_change)
Support floating button (data-testid='support-floating-btn') visible on dashboard
Notification badge on floating button shows unread count with animate-pulse effect
Bell icon in modal header opens notification center
Notification center displays notifications with correct icons (Bot for AI, RefreshCw for status)
Notification items show title, message, timestamp, and ticket ID badge
Clicking notification marks it as read
'Tout lire' button marks all notifications as read
Badge disappears when all notifications are read
critical_code_review_comments: SupportFloatingButton.jsx: Well-implemented notification center with polling (30s interval)
SupportFloatingButton.jsx: Toast notifications for new notifications during polling (fetchNotificationsQuiet)
SupportFloatingButton.jsx: Proper state management for notifications with previousNotificationIds tracking
routes.py: create_support_notification helper function correctly creates notifications in database
routes.py: ai_analyze_ticket creates notification after successful AI analysis
routes.py: update_ticket creates notification on status change with proper emoji and label
seed_data_creation: Notifications created via AI analysis and status change during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time notification system fully implemented and tested. Notifications are created automatically when: 1) AI analyzes a ticket (type: ai_response), 2) Ticket status changes (type: status_change). Polling interval is 30 seconds. Toast notifications appear for new notifications during polling. All notifications are persisted in MongoDB 'notifications' collection with read/unread status.

mocked_apis.note: AI analysis uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o). All notification APIs are fully functional.

notification_badge.behavior: Shows unread count with animate-pulse effect, disappears when 0

notification_center.access: Bell icon in support modal header

status_change.title: ✅ Statut mis à jour (or other emoji based on status)

polling.toast_on_new: Yes - shows toast with 'Voir' action button
